name: Poultry Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 cup green bell pepper, seeded, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over moderately-high flame.
2. Add onions, bell peppers, and garlic.
3. Heat and stir for 3-4 minutes.
4. Add turkey or chicken; heat and stir for 8-10 minutes.
5. Stir in tomato concasse, beans, tomato sauce, soy, and spices.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1-2 hours.
7. Serve hot, garnished with minced scallions.
